description: HelloMavens-authored editorial overrides for SBS controls. The override is the editorial escape hatch — sync-sbs prefers upstream sources (YAML risk_level > markdown <Badge>) before falling back to overrides. See control-overrides.LICENSE.txt for the rationale per entry. (alpha.4 emptied: SBS-AUTH-004 was the sole entry, retired once the markdown-badge fallback landed in resolveRiskLevel — the badge declares Critical and is the canonical upstream source.)
